scripts.influxdb:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml --profile influxdb up -d influxdb
scripts.influxdb:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml --profile influxdb stop influxdb
scripts.grafana:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml --profile influxdb --profile grafana up -d influxdb grafana
scripts.grafana:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml --profile grafana stop grafana
scripts.patterns:analyze: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml exec -T nightscout-mongo sh -lc "mongo nightscout --quiet" < scripts/analyze-patterns.mjs
scripts.features:build: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml exec -T nightscout-mongo sh -lc "mongo nightscout --quiet" < scripts/build-entry-features.mjs
scripts.vectors:build: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml exec -T nightscout-mongo sh -lc "mongo nightscout --quiet" < scripts/build-episode-vectors.mjs
scripts.snapshots:backfill: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml exec -T nightscout-mongo sh -lc "mongo nightscout --quiet" < scripts/backfill-prediction-snapshots.mjs
scripts.snapshots:evaluate: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml exec -T nightscout-mongo sh -lc "mongo nightscout --quiet" < scripts/evaluate-predictions.mjs
scripts.summaries:build: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml exec -T nightscout-mongo sh -lc "mongo nightscout --quiet" < scripts/summarize-days.mjs
scripts.episodes:build: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml --profile libre run --rm libreview-sync node scripts/build-reactive-hypo-episodes.mjs
scripts.episodes:dedup: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml --profile libre run --rm libreview-sync node scripts/dedup-reactive-hypo-episodes.mjs
scripts.hypo:backtest: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml --profile libre run --rm libreview-sync node scripts/evaluate-hypo-detector.mjs
scripts.hypo:tune: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml --profile libre run --rm libreview-sync node scripts/tune-reactive-hypo-v2.mjs
scripts.hypo:report: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml --profile libre run --rm libreview-sync node scripts/hypo-report.mjs
scripts.hypo:patterns: docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml --profile libre run --rm libreview-sync node scripts/hypo-patterns.mjs
scripts.ai:check: node --check scripts/libreview-nightscout-sync.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/ai-review-core.mjs && node --check nightscout-overlay/rate-overlay.js && node scripts/run-ai-tdz-check.mjs
scripts.dump:entries: mkdir -p exports && docker compose -f docker-compose.nightscout.yml exec -T nightscout-mongo mongo nightscout --quiet < scripts/dump-entries-mongo.mjs > exports/live-entries.json
scripts.export:gemini:live: npm run dump:entries && node scripts/export-gemini-cgm.mjs exports/live-entries.json exports/gemini-cgm-live
